project_state.expansion_model: v1.0 defines core message schemas and validation. v2.0 adds transport adapters (WebSocket, gRPC). v3.0 introduces advanced patterns (consensus, auction, delegation). v4.0 adds security extensions (signing, encryption). v5.0+ includes language bindings, discovery mechanisms, and monitoring tools

roadmap_summary: Building: agent-protocol. A standardized protocol specification for secure, typed communication between autonomous agents. ~20 commits to v1.0.
notes: This file is Karta-0's working memory. It is committed after every run. Do not edit manually.
